triumph-765-stock-fit.name: Triumph 765 STOCK (MotoSPEC fit)
triumph-765-stock-fit.note: Equivalence-class fit against the MotoSPEC oracle, layout constrained by owner rounds 1+2 (rocker pivot ~9mm under the swingarm line vs described ~5; linkarm anchor ~48mm behind the pivot vs described ~40, below it; shock top forward of the rocker). Displayed oracle channels exact to ±0.003 MR; chart midpoints ±0.03.
